LanguageData.Infusion.ApparelPolicy.ManageDescription: Choose which apparel infusions are allowed for this apparel policy. By default, all apparel infusions are allowed.
LanguageData.Infusion.ApparelPolicy.ManageTip: Manage which apparel infusions are allowed for policy "{0}".
LanguageData.Infusion.ApparelPolicy.NoInfusions: No apparel infusions match the current search.
